prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `fb791726`.
codex_response:
Implemented the `fb791726` task package in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_fb791726/__init__.py#L1), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_fb791726/verifier.py#L1), and [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_fb791726/generator.py#L1). The rule is: double the canvas in both dimensions, copy the full input into the upper-left and lower-right quadrants, then turn any all-zero input row that sits between two non-zero rows into a full-width green row in both copies. The summary hint was used, not discarded; the `arc2_opus46_summary.json` description matched the official examples, so no `notes.md` was needed. No new primitive was added.

Validation passed end-to-end: official examples were `4/4`, the shared builder produced 1000 verified examples, and the preview sheet looked on-family. The generator matches the task family by sampling square, very sparse inputs with one foreground color and singleton vertical pairs placed in contiguous diagonal 3-row blocks, with optional empty trailing margin.
